title: lyonia macrocalyx
intro: Lyonia macrocalyx, also known as the tree lyonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lyonia macrocalyx are said to include reducing fever, alleviating cough, and improving respiratory health, as well as its potential in treating various infections. In traditional herbal preparations, Lyonia macrocalyx is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
